//: Build config for the custom escape-hatch handlers. `rayspec` serve/deploy runs on a compiled JavaScript runtime, so a backend whose spec references custom `.ts` handlers must compile them to `.js` before deploy. This config transpiles handlers/*.ts to ESM `.js` under dist/ (see build.mjs). The handler modules import @rayspec/handler-sdk type-only, so `noCheck` (transpile-only) needs no dependency resolution and the type imports are erased.
